description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a square display framed by a moderately thick, light gray bezel. The front face is dominated by the black screen, while the rear features a slightly protruding rectangular panel, likely for housing internal electronics, and a set of ventilation slits on one side. The monitor is supported by a wide, circular black pedestal stand that provides stability. The side views reveal the monitor's slim profile and the gentle tapering of the rear housing. Several small buttons are visible on the rear left edge, arranged vertically for user control. No visible ports or brand logos are present on any side of the monitor.
description: A flat-panel computer monitor with a square black screen, light gray bezel, and a wide circular black stand. Rear panel features ventilation slits and vertically arranged control buttons.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black display area framed by a light gray bezel and the circular base beneath.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the monitor's slim profile, the rear housing's gentle taper, and visible ventilation slits.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rectangular rear panel, mounting points, and a vertical row of control buttons on the left edge.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the slim profile and the absence of visible buttons or slits on this side.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is moderately thick, light gray, with a smooth matte finish and sharp corners, providing a subtle contrast to the black screen. No decorative elements or rounded corners are present.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a wide, circular pedestal base made of black plastic, attached to a rectangular support that connects to the rear of the monitor. It appears stable but does not show visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: A vertical row of small buttons is located on the rear left edge of the monitor, grouped together for easy access.
